description: Test suite for the skill-evaluator meta-skill

evals.name: security-gate-rejects-evil-skill
evals.expected: Security gate should FAIL (remote code execution + unauthorized data exfiltration)

assertions.name: remote-exec-detected
assertions.test: output contains ❌ 远程代码执行

assertions.name: data-exfil-detected
assertions.test: output contains ❌ 网络外呼 或 ❌ (data exfiltration pattern)

evals.name: good-skill-scores-high
evals.expected: Good skill should score 80+ (strong trigger precision + iron laws + verification)

assertions.name: trigger-precision
assertions.test: trigger description mentions both what to use and what NOT to use for scoring 20+

assertions.name: iron-law-present
assertions.test: iron law and rationalizations table present for 18/18 in force

evals.name: meh-skill-scores-low
evals.expected: Meh skill should score low (< 50) due to vague trigger, no iron laws, no validation, no examples

assertions.name: trigger-precision-low
assertions.test: trigger description is vague for low score

assertions.name: no-iron-law
assertions.test: no iron laws or constraints found
